selected_preflight.reason: Required by the Monocle Man React contract for qid/action/useRegisterAction instrumentation and React accessibility expectations.

selected_preflight.required_when: Any deliverable with a frontend or live DOM.
selected_preflight.reason: Required to prove live DOM interaction coverage, qid/COTS assertions, screenshots, keyboard flow, modal behavior, animation behavior, and deterministic pass/fail independent of model prose.

selected_preflight.required_when: Any deliverable with visual UI/frontend surface.
selected_preflight.reason: Required to review screenshots and visual UX with persona-bound critique after deterministic interaction evidence exists.

selected_preflight.required_when: Any code deliverable, including frontend or API backend.
selected_preflight.reason: Required to review scoped code/diff/tests/contracts and ensure rendered verification is not replaced by source inspection.
Required to write the mandatory evidence-bearing report covering source of truth, plan, evidence, findings, blockers, actions, acceptance checks, non-claims, and plan-iterate seed.

plugins_and_tools_selected_preflight.required_when: Repository source, branches, PRs, CI runs, artifacts, and durable records are required.
plugins_and_tools_selected_preflight.reason: Primary source of truth and mutation surface for chatgpt-lab and snippets.

plugins_and_tools_selected_preflight.required_when: Current external references, official docs, or live public URL inspection are required.
plugins_and_tools_selected_preflight.reason: Required by the contract for current React/accessibility/deployment references and by live-delivery checks when available.
Deterministic execution, screenshot, interaction, accessibility, and Pages build/deploy evidence.

plugins_and_tools_selected_preflight.required_when: The deliverable is a static-build frontend and GitHub is selected as delivery authority.
plugins_and_tools_selected_preflight.reason: Hosts the Vite static build for live review without requiring Netlify.

when_deliverable_has_api_backend: Select backend/API contract test tooling before implementation.
Define API endpoint contracts, request/response fixtures, auth/security assumptions, and failure-mode tests before coding.
Record API CI evidence and non-claims in REPORT.md.

missing_or_partial_execution.reason: No persona-bound visual review bundle has been produced for the live GitHub Pages URL yet. CI screenshots exist, but live URL visual inspection remains unproven.
The code changes were not independently reviewed through a recorded review-code bundle. Deterministic CI passed, but review-code evidence is missing.
Playwright implements deterministic live-DOM interaction evidence with qid/action/keyboard/modal/animation checks, but a standalone test-interactions manifest/review bundle was not created.

selection_rule: At round start, decide and record the smallest sufficient skills/plugins before implementation. For any frontend, include best-practices-react, test-interactions, review-design, review-code, and best-practices-report. For any API backend, include review-code plus API contract/testing evidence before coding.
